Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
  Definition of tensorial strength between actions over monoidal categories, as introduced
  under the name C-categories and C-functors (for C a monoidal category) by Bodo Pareigis (1977).

  The concrete definition is close to the paper "Second-Order and Dependently-Sorted Abstract Syntax" by Marcelo Fiore (2008). Notably, the strength itself is not required to be an isomorphism.

  To distinguish this from less general approaches, we will speak of action-based strength.

  Added by Ralph Matthes in 2021: relative strength of Ahrens and Matthes defined and shown to be an instance of action-based strength, another general definition in the spirit of Janelidze and Kelly
**)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.EndofunctorsMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.Actions.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorsTensored.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.EndofunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section A.

Context (Mon_V : MonoidalCategoriesTensored.monoidal_cat).

Local Definition I := monoidal_cat_unit Mon_V.
Local Definition tensor := monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V.
Notation "X ⊗ Y" := (tensor (X ,, Y)).

Section ActionBasedStrengths_Definition.

  Context {A A': category}.
Context (actn : action Mon_V A)(actn' : action Mon_V A').

Local Definition ϱ := act_ϱ actn.
Local Definition χ := act_χ actn.
Local Definition ϱ' := act_ϱ actn'.
Local Definition χ' := act_χ actn'.

Section ActionBasedStrengths_Natural_Transformation.

Context (F : A ⟶ A').

Notation "X ⊙ Y" := (act_odot actn (X , Y)) (at level 31).
Notation "f #⊙ g" := (#(act_odot actn) (f #, g)) (at level 31).
Notation "X ⊙' Y" := (act_odot actn' (X , Y)) (at level 31).
Notation "f #⊙' g" := (#(act_odot actn') (f #, g)) (at level 31).

Definition actionbased_strength_dom : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟶ A' :=
  functor_composite (pair_functor F (functor_identity _)) (act_odot actn').


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
actionbased_strength_dom =
(λ ax : A ⊠ Mon_V, F (ob1 ax) ⊙' ob2 ax)


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
actionbased_strength_dom =
(λ ax : A ⊠ Mon_V, F (ob1 ax) ⊙' ob2 ax)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition actionbased_strength_codom : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟶ A' :=
  functor_composite (act_odot actn) F.


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
actionbased_strength_codom =
(λ ax : A ⊠ Mon_V, F (ob1 ax ⊙ ob2 ax))


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
actionbased_strength_codom =
(λ ax : A ⊠ Mon_V, F (ob1 ax ⊙ ob2 ax))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition actionbased_strength_nat : UU := nat_trans actionbased_strength_dom actionbased_strength_codom.

Definition actionbased_strength_nat_funclass (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat):
  ∏ x : ob (A ⊠ Mon_V), actionbased_strength_dom x --> actionbased_strength_codom x
  := pr1 ϛ.
Coercion actionbased_strength_nat_funclass : actionbased_strength_nat >-> Funclass.

Definition actionbased_strength_triangle_eq (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat) :=
  ∏ (a : A), (ϛ (a, I)) · (#F (ϱ a)) = ϱ' (F a).

Definition actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat): UU := ∏ (a : A), ∏ (v w : Mon_V),
  (χ' ((F a, v), w)) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
  (ϛ (a, v)) #⊙' (id w) · (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)) · (#F (χ ((a, v), w))).

(** the notion in Fiore's LICS'08 paper *)
Definition actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant1 (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat): UU := ∏ (a : A), ∏ (v w : Mon_V),
  ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)) · (ϛ (a, v)) #⊙' (id w) · (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)) · (#F (χ ((a, v), w))).

(** the notion that fits with the definition of relative strength in the TYPES'15 post-proceedings paper by Ahrens and Matthes *)
Definition actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant2 (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat): UU := ∏ (a : A), ∏ (v w : Mon_V),
  ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) · (#F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w))) =
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)) · (ϛ (a, v)) #⊙' (id w) · (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)).

(** as expected, the notions are logically equivalent *)

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq ϛ
→ actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant1 ϛ


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq ϛ
→ actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant1 ϛ

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq ϛ
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w)) = ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w)) = ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
pr1 (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w)) = ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
pr1 (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· (# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w)))) =
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))) =
make_z_iso (pr1 χ' ((F a, v), w))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)))
  (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
make_z_iso (pr1 χ' ((F a, v), w))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)))
  (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· (ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w)))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
make_z_iso (pr1 χ' ((F a, v), w))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)))
  (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
pr1 χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w))

  apply Heq.
Qed.


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
pr1 (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· # F (χ ((a, v), w)) =
χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
pr1 (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso (pr1 χ' ((F a, v), w))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)))
     (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w)))
· (# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))) =
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)

v, w: Mon_V
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ' ((F a, v), w))
· (# (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))) =

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant1 ϛ
→ actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq_variant2 ϛ

A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A

v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· # F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)

ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat

ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· # F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
?b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · 
ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· # F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· # F
    (make_nat_trans
       (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
          (act_odot actn))
       (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A (act_odot actn))
       (λ c : (A ⊠ Mon_V) ⊠ Mon_V,
        is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ c))
       (λ (c c' : (A ⊠ Mon_V) ⊠ Mon_V)
        (f : (A ⊠ Mon_V) ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
        ! z_iso_inv_on_right
            (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
               (act_odot actn) c)
            (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
               (act_odot actn) c)
            (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
               (act_odot actn) c') (χ c,, pr2 χ c)
            (# (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
                  (act_odot actn)) f
             · inv_from_z_iso (χ c',, pr2 χ c'))
            (# (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                  (act_odot actn)) f)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (A
                ⟦ odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                    (act_odot actn) c,
                odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                  (act_odot actn) c' ⟧)
               ((χ c,, pr2 χ c)
                · (# (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
                        (act_odot actn)) f
                   · inv_from_z_iso (χ c',, pr2 χ c')))
               ((χ c,, pr2 χ c)
                · # (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
                       (act_odot actn)) f
                · inv_from_z_iso (χ c',, pr2 χ c'))
               (λ p : A
                      ⟦ odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                          (act_odot actn) c,
                      odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                        (act_odot actn) c' ⟧,
                # (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                     (act_odot actn)) f = p)
               (z_iso_inv_on_left
                  (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                     (act_odot actn) c)
                  (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                     (act_odot actn) c')
                  (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
                     (act_odot actn) c')
                  (# (odot_x_odot_y_functor Mon_V A
                        (act_odot actn)) f)
                  (χ c',, pr2 χ c')
                  ((χ c,, pr2 χ c)
                   · # (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V
                          A (act_odot actn)) f)
                  (! nat_trans_ax χ c c' f))
               (assoc (χ c,, pr2 χ c)
                  (# (odot_x_otimes_y_functor Mon_V A
                        (act_odot actn)) f)
                  (inv_from_z_iso (χ c',, pr2 χ c')))))
       ((a, v), w)) = ?b
  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· # F (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))) = 
?b

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
# F (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))) = ?t2

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
?t2 = # F (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 χ ((a, v), w)))

    apply functor_on_inv_from_z_iso'.
  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (make_z_iso (# F (pr1 χ ((a, v), w)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
             (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))
       (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
          (pr2 χ ((a, v), w)))) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) =
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (make_z_iso (# F (pr1 χ ((a, v), w)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
             (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))
       (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
          (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
Heq: ∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w))
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ' ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w) · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w)
· make_z_iso (# F (χ ((a, v), w)))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
          (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))
    (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F (pr2 χ ((a, v), w)))

  apply Heq.
Qed.

v, w: Mon_V

· # F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) =

· # F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) =

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
# F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso (# F (χ ((a, v), w)))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
           (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
        (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso (# F (χ ((a, v), w)))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
           (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))))
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
        (pr2 χ ((a, v), w)))) =
# F (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv χ ((a, v), w))

  apply (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso' _ (pr2 χ ((a, v), w))).
Qed.


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
isaprop (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq ϛ)


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
isaprop (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq ϛ)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
isofhlevel 1 (ϛ (a, I) · # F (ϱ a) = ϱ' (F a))

  apply homset_property.
Qed.


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
isaprop (actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq ϛ)


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
isaprop (actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq ϛ)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ v w : Mon_V,
   χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
   # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w)))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
v: Mon_V
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ w : Mon_V,
   χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
   # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w)))

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
isofhlevel 1
  (χ' ((F a, v), w) · ϛ (a, v ⊗ w) =
   # (act_odot actn') (ϛ (a, v) #, id w)
   · ϛ (a ⊙ v, w) · # F (χ ((a, v), w)))

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

End ActionBasedStrengths_Natural_Transformation.

Definition actionbased_strength (F : A ⟶ A') : UU := ∑ (ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat F),
   (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F ϛ) × (actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F ϛ).


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
pr1 sη = pr1 sη' → sη = sη'


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
pr1 sη = pr1 sη' → sη = sη'

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
sη = sη'

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
isPredicate
  (λ x : actionbased_strength_nat F,
   actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F x
   × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F x)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat F
isaprop
  (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F ϛ
   × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F ϛ)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat F
isaprop (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F ϛ)
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category

actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat F
isaprop (actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F ϛ)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat F
isaprop (actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F ϛ)
 apply isaprop_actionbased_strength_triangle_eq.
  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
actn: action Mon_V A
actn': action Mon_V A'
F: A ⟶ A'
sη, sη': actionbased_strength F
Heq: pr1 sη = pr1 sη'
ϛ: actionbased_strength_nat F
isaprop (actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F ϛ)
 apply isaprop_actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq.
Qed.

Definition actionbased_strength_to_nat {F : A ⟶ A'} (FF : actionbased_strength F) :
  actionbased_strength_nat F
  := pr1 FF.
Coercion actionbased_strength_to_nat : actionbased_strength >-> actionbased_strength_nat.

(*
Definition actionbased_strength_to_nat_trans {F : A ⟶ A'} (FF : actionbased_strength F) :
  nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom F) (actionbased_strength_codom F)
  := pr1 FF.
Coercion actionbased_strength_to_nat_trans : actionbased_strength >-> nat_trans.
 *)
Identity Coercion actionbased_strength_nat_to_nat_trans : actionbased_strength_nat >-> nat_trans.

Definition ab_strength_triangle {F : A ⟶ A'} (FF : actionbased_strength F) :
  actionbased_strength_triangle_eq F FF
  := pr1 (pr2 FF).

Definition ab_strength_pentagon {F : A ⟶ A'} (FF : actionbased_strength F) :
  actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq F FF
  := pr2 (pr2 FF).

End ActionBasedStrengths_Definition.

A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
actionbased_strength actn actn (functor_identity A)

 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn actn
   (functor_identity A) ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn actn
     (functor_identity A) ϛ) 
  ?pr1

⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn (functor_identity A)
    av,
actionbased_strength_codom actn (functor_identity A)
  av ⟧
 apply identity.
    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
is_nat_trans
  (actionbased_strength_dom actn (functor_identity A))
  (actionbased_strength_codom actn
     (functor_identity A))
  ((λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
    id actionbased_strength_codom actn
         (functor_identity A) av)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn
        (functor_identity A))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn
        (functor_identity A)))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actn (functor_identity A))
  fg
· id actionbased_strength_codom actn
       (functor_identity A) av' =
id actionbased_strength_codom actn
     (functor_identity A) av
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn
       (functor_identity A)) fg

A: category

fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧

· id act_odot actn av' =
id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
· id act_odot actn av' = # (act_odot actn) fg
 apply id_right.
  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
(λ ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat actn actn
         (functor_identity A),
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn actn
   (functor_identity A) ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn actn
     (functor_identity A) ϛ)
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn
        (functor_identity A))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn
        (functor_identity A))
     ((λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
       id actionbased_strength_codom actn
            (functor_identity A) av)
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (actionbased_strength_dom actn
           (functor_identity A))
        (actionbased_strength_codom actn
           (functor_identity A)))
     ((λ (av av' : A ⊠ Mon_V)
       (fg : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)
         (id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg)
         (# (act_odot actn) fg)
         (λ p : A ⟦ act_odot actn av,
                act_odot actn av' ⟧,
          # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
          · id act_odot actn av' = p)
         (id_right (# (act_odot actn) fg))
         (id_left (# (act_odot actn) fg))
       :
       # (actionbased_strength_dom actn
            (functor_identity A)) fg
       · id actionbased_strength_codom actn
              (functor_identity A) av' =
       id actionbased_strength_codom actn
            (functor_identity A) av
       · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn
              (functor_identity A)) fg)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (actionbased_strength_dom actn
           (functor_identity A))
        (actionbased_strength_codom actn
           (functor_identity A))
        ((λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
          id actionbased_strength_codom actn
               (functor_identity A) av)
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (actionbased_strength_dom actn
              (functor_identity A))
           (actionbased_strength_codom actn
              (functor_identity A)))))

      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)

               ⟧,
         # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
         · id act_odot actn av' = p)

A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
make_nat_trans
  (actionbased_strength_dom actn (functor_identity A))
  (actionbased_strength_codom actn
     (functor_identity A))
  (λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
   id actionbased_strength_codom actn
        (functor_identity A) av)
  (λ (av av' : A ⊠ Mon_V)
   (fg : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)
     (id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg)
     (# (act_odot actn) fg)
     (λ p : A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧,
      # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
      · id act_odot actn av' = p)
     (id_right (# (act_odot actn) fg))
     (id_left (# (act_odot actn) fg))) (a, I)
· # (functor_identity A) (ϱ actn a) =
ϱ' actn (functor_identity A a)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
id act_odot actn (a, I) · ϱ actn a = ϱ' actn a
 apply id_left.

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((functor_identity A a, v), w)
· make_nat_trans
    (actionbased_strength_dom actn
       (functor_identity A))
    (actionbased_strength_codom actn
       (functor_identity A))
    (λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
     id actionbased_strength_codom actn
          (functor_identity A) av)
    (λ (av av' : A ⊠ Mon_V)
     (fg : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)
       (id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg)
       (# (act_odot actn) fg)
       (λ p : A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av'
              ⟧,
        # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
        · id act_odot actn av' = p)
       (id_right (# (act_odot actn) fg))
       (id_left (# (act_odot actn) fg))) (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn)
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn
        (functor_identity A))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn
        (functor_identity A))
     (λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
      id actionbased_strength_codom actn
           (functor_identity A) av)
     (λ (av av' : A ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)
        (id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg)
        (# (act_odot actn) fg)
        (λ p : A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av'
               ⟧,
         # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
         · id act_odot actn av' = p)
        (id_right (# (act_odot actn) fg))
        (id_left (# (act_odot actn) fg))) (a, v)
  #, id w)
· make_nat_trans
    (actionbased_strength_dom actn
       (functor_identity A))
    (actionbased_strength_codom actn
       (functor_identity A))
    (λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
     id actionbased_strength_codom actn
          (functor_identity A) av)
    (λ (av av' : A ⊠ Mon_V)
     (fg : A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av' ⟧)
       (id act_odot actn av · # (act_odot actn) fg)
       (# (act_odot actn) fg)
       (λ p : A ⟦ act_odot actn av, act_odot actn av'
              ⟧,
        # (act_odot actn) (pr1 fg #, pr2 fg)
        · id act_odot actn av' = p)
       (id_right (# (act_odot actn) fg))
       (id_left (# (act_odot actn) fg)))
    (act_odot actn (a, v), w)
· # (functor_identity A) (χ actn ((a, v), w))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((a, v), w) · id act_odot actn (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn) (id act_odot actn (a, v) #, id w)
· id act_odot actn (act_odot actn (a, v), w)
· χ actn ((a, v), w)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((a, v), w) · id act_odot actn (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn) (id (act_odot actn (a, v), w))
· id act_odot actn (act_odot actn (a, v), w)
· χ actn ((a, v), w)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((a, v), w) =
# (act_odot actn) (id (act_odot actn (a, v), w))
· χ actn ((a, v), w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((a, v), w) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
?b =
# (act_odot actn) (id (act_odot actn (a, v), w))
· χ actn ((a, v), w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
?b =
# (act_odot actn) (id (act_odot actn (a, v), w))
· χ actn ((a, v), w)
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
?f = # (act_odot actn) (id (act_odot actn (a, v), w))
 apply pathsinv0, functor_id. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A: category
actn: action Mon_V A
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn ((a, v), w) =
id act_odot actn (act_odot actn (a, v), w)
· χ actn ((a, v), w)

      apply pathsinv0, id_left.
Defined.


Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
→ actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
  → actionbased_strength actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')

A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3

F': A2 ⟶ A3
actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
→ actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
  → actionbased_strength actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')

actn3: action Mon_V A3

F': A2 ⟶ A3

actionbased_strength actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')

(λ ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F'),
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn1 actn3 
   (F ∙ F') ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn1 actn3
     (F ∙ F') ϛ) ?pr1

A3 ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F') av,
actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F') av ⟧
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
A3 ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F') (a,, v),
actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F') (a,, v) ⟧

      exact (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))).
    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
is_nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
  (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
  ((λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
    (λ (a : A1) (v : Mon_V),
     ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))) (pr1 av)
      (pr2 av))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
av, av': A1 ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F')) fg
· (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
   · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) =
ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av) · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')) fg
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
av': A1 ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ a,, v, av' ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F')) fg
· (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
   · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')) fg
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
a': A1
v': Mon_V
fg: A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ a,, v, a',, v' ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F')) fg
· (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')) fg
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
a': A1
v': Mon_V
f: A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧
g: Mon_V ⟦ pr2 (a,, v), pr2 (a',, v') ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F')) (f,, g)
· (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
    (f,, g)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
a': A1
v': Mon_V
f: A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧
g: Mon_V ⟦ pr2 (a,, v), pr2 (a',, v') ⟧
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (# F f) #, g)
· (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # F' (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v: Mon_V
a': A1
v': Mon_V
f: A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧
g: Mon_V ⟦ pr2 (a,, v), pr2 (a',, v') ⟧
ζisnatinst: # (actionbased_strength_dom actn2 F)
  (f,, g) · ζ (a',, v') =
ζ (a,, v)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 F)
    (f,, g)
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (# F f) #, g)
· (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # F' (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g)))

actn3: action Mon_V A3

F': A2 ⟶ A3

ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'

a': A1
v': Mon_V
f: A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧
g: Mon_V ⟦ pr2 (a,, v), pr2 (a',, v') ⟧
ζisnatinst: # (actionbased_strength_dom actn2 F)
  (f,, g) · ζ (a',, v') =
ζ (a,, v)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 F)
    (f,, g)
ζ'isnatinst: # (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F')
  (# F f,, g) · ζ' (F a',, v') =
ζ' (F a,, v)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
    (# F f,, g)
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (# F f) #, g)
· (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # F' (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g)))

ζ (a,, v)

    (f,, g)

  (# F f,, g) · ζ' (F a',, v') =
ζ' (F a,, v)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
    (# F f,, g)
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (# F f) #, g)
· ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v')) = ?b

  (f,, g) · ζ (a',, v') =

    (f,, g)

  (# F f,, g) · ζ' (F a',, v') =
ζ' (F a,, v)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
    (# F f,, g)
?b =
ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
· # F' (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g)))

· ζ' (F a',, v') = ?f'

        apply ζ'isnatinst.

· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F') (# F f,, g)
· # F' (ζ (a',, v')) =

· # F' (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g)))

v': Mon_V
f: A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧

  (f,, g) · ζ (a',, v') =
ζ (a,, v)

    (f,, g)
ζ'isnatinst: # (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F')
  (# F f,, g) · ζ' (F a',, v') =

· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
