# (act_odot actn2) (# F f,, g) · ζ (a',, v') =
ζ (a,, v) · # F (# (act_odot actn1) (f,, g))

      apply ζisnatinst.
  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
(λ ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F'),
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')
   ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn1 actn3
     (F ∙ F') ϛ)
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     ((λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
       (λ (a : A1) (v : Mon_V),
        ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))) (pr1 av)
         (pr2 av))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
        (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')))
     ((λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
       (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
       (λ (a : A1) (v : Mon_V)
        (fg0 : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ a,, v, av' ⟧),
        (λ (a' : A1) (v' : Mon_V)
         (fg1 : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ a,, v, a',, v' ⟧),
         (λ (f : A1 ⟦ pr1 (a,, v), pr1 (a',, v') ⟧)
          (g : Mon_V ⟦ pr2 (a,, v), pr2 (a',, v') ⟧),
          (let ζisnatinst :=
             nat_trans_ax ζ (a,, v) (a',, v') (f,, g)
             in
           let ζ'isnatinst :=
             nat_trans_ax ζ' (F a,, v) (F a',, v')
               (# F f,, g) in
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (A3 ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (...), v),
              F' (F (...)) ⟧)
             (# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (...) #, g)
              · (ζ' (...) · # F' (...)))
             (# (act_odot actn3) (# F' ... #, g)
              · ζ' (...,, v') · # F' (ζ (...)))
             (λ p : A3 ⟦ act_odot actn3 (..., v),
                    F' (...) ⟧,
              p = ζ' ... · # F' ... · # F' (...))
             (cancel_postcomposition
                (# ... ... · ζ' ...)
                (ζ' ... · # ... ...) (# F' (...))
                ζ'isnatinst @
              internal_paths_rew
                (A3
                 ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                     ..., F' ... ⟧) (ζ' ... · (...))
                (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                (internal_paths_rew (...) (...) (...)
                   (...) (...) (...))
                (... · ... · # F' ...)
                (assoc (...) (...) (...)))
             (assoc
                (# (act_odot actn3) (# F' ... #, g))
                (ζ' (...,, v')) (# F' (ζ ...))))
          :
          # (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
            (f,, g)
          · (ζ' (F a',, v') · # F' (ζ (a',, v'))) =
          ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))
          · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn1
                 (F ∙ F')) (f,, g)) (pr1 fg1)
           (pr2 fg1)) (pr1 av') (pr2 av') fg0)
         (pr1 av) (pr2 av) fg)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
        (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
        ((λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
          (λ (a : A1) (v : Mon_V),
           ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v))) (pr1 av)
            (pr2 av))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
           (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F')))))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
     (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      let ζisnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
          (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
      let ζ'isnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
          (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A3
         ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
            · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
         internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                      (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            p =
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew
              (A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F'
                      (# F
                         (# (act_odot actn1)
                            (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
              (λ p : A3
                     ⟦ act_odot actn3
                         (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
               ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                       F') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                  · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
              (maponpaths
                 (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F'
                         (act_odot actn2
                            (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                        · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (λ p : A3
                           ⟦ F'
                               (act_odot actn2
                                  (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                           F'
                             (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                           ⟧,
                     p =
                     # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                     · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A3
                        ⟦ F'
                            (act_odot actn2
                               (F (...), pr2 av)),
                        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                        ⟧)
                       (# F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                           · # F (# (...) (...))))
                       (λ p : A3
                              ⟦ F'
                                  (act_odot actn2
                                     (..., ...)),
                              F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                        # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                        p)
                       (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                       (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                        · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                       (functor_comp F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                          (# F
                             (# (act_odot actn1)
                                (...,, ...)))))
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                       (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
              (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                 (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                 (# F'
                    (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                          (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
        (assoc
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))))
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn1 actn3 
  (F ∙ F')
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
     (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      let ζisnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
          (pr1 av',, pr2 av') 
          (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
      let ζ'isnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ' 
          (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
          (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A3
         ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
            · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
         internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                      (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            p =
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew
              (A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F'
                      (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                       (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
              (λ p : A3
                     ⟦ act_odot actn3
                       (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                     F'
                       (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
               ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                       F') 
                    (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                  · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
              (maponpaths
                 (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F'
                       (act_odot actn2
                       (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                     F'
                       (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                       · 
                       ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (λ p : 
                       A3
                       ⟦ 
                       F'
                       (act_odot actn2
                       (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                       F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...))) ⟧,
                     p =
                     # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                     · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A3
                       ⟦ 
                       F'
                       (act_odot actn2
                       (F (...), pr2 av)),
                       F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...))) ⟧)
                       (# F'
                       (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                       · 
                       # F (# (...) (...))))
                       (λ 
                       p : 
                       A3
                       ⟦ 
                       F' 
                       (act_odot actn2 (..., ...)),
                       F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                       # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                       p) 
                       (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                       (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                       · 
                       # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                       (functor_comp F'
                       (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                       (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1) (...,, ...)))))
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                       (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                       (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
              (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                 (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                 (# F'
                    (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                       (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
        (assoc
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))))

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
     (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      let ζisnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
          (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
      let ζ'isnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
          (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A3
         ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
            · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
         internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                      (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            p =
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew
              (A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F'
                      (# F
                         (# (act_odot actn1)
                            (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
              (λ p : A3
                     ⟦ act_odot actn3
                         (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
               ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                       F') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                  · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
              (maponpaths
                 (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F'
                         (act_odot actn2
                            (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                        · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (λ p : A3
                           ⟦ F'
                               (act_odot actn2
                                  (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                           F'
                             (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                           ⟧,
                     p =
                     # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                     · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A3
                        ⟦ F'
                            (act_odot actn2
                               (F (...), pr2 av)),
                        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                        ⟧)
                       (# F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                           · # F (# (...) (...))))
                       (λ p : A3
                              ⟦ F'
                                  (act_odot actn2
                                     (..., ...)),
                              F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                        # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                        p)
                       (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                       (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                        · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                       (functor_comp F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                          (# F
                             (# (act_odot actn1)
                                (...,, ...)))))
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                       (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
              (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                 (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                 (# F'
                    (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                          (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
        (assoc
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
make_nat_trans
  (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
  (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
  (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
   ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
   · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
  (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
   (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
   let ζisnatinst :=
     nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
       (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
   let ζ'isnatinst :=
     nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
       (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
     in
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (A3 ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
      F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
     (# (act_odot actn3)
        (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
      · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
     (# (act_odot actn3)
        (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
      · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
     (λ p : A3
            ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧,
      p =
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
      · # F'
          (# F (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
        (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
             (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
        (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
      internal_paths_rew
        (A3
         ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
             (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
              (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                   (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ act_odot actn3
                      (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
           (maponpaths
              (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
              (internal_paths_rew
                 (A3
                  ⟦ F'
                      (act_odot actn2
                         (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                 (# F'
                    (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                     · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                 (λ p : A3
                        ⟦ F'
                            (act_odot actn2
                               (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                        ⟧,
                  p =
                  # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F'
                         (act_odot actn2
                            (F (...), pr2 av)),
                     F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...))) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                        · # F (# (...) (...))))
                    (λ p : A3
                           ⟦ F'
                               (act_odot actn2
                                  (..., ...)),
                           F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                     # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                     p) (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                    (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                     · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                       (# F
                          (# (act_odot actn1)
                             (...,, ...)))))
                 (# F'
                    (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                  · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                 (functor_comp F'
                    (# (act_odot actn2)
                       (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                    (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
              (# F'
                 (# F
                    (# (act_odot actn1)
                       (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
        (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
             (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
           (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
              (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
     (assoc
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
        (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
        (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))) (a, I)
· # (F ∙ F') (ϱ actn1 a) = ϱ' actn3 ((F ∙ F') a)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I))
· # F' (# F (ϱ actn1 a)) = ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I))
· # F' (# F (ϱ actn1 a)) = ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I))
· # F' (# F (ϱ actn1 a)) = ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I)
· (# F' (ζ (a,, I)) · # F' (# F (ϱ actn1 a))) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a)) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
?b = ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ζ (a,, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a)) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ (a,, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) = ?t2
 exact ζtriangleeqinst. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
ζtriangleeqinst: ζ (a, I) · # F (ϱ actn1 a) =
ϱ' actn2 (F a)
ζ'triangleeqinst: ζ' (F a, I) · # F' (ϱ actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))
ζ' (F a,, I) · # F' (ϱ' actn2 (F a)) =
ϱ' actn3 (F' (F a))

      exact ζ'triangleeqinst.
    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actn1 actn3 (F ∙ F')
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
     (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      let ζisnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
          (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
      let ζ'isnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
          (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A3
         ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
            · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
         internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                      (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            p =
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew
              (A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F'
                      (# F
                         (# (act_odot actn1)
                            (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
              (λ p : A3
                     ⟦ act_odot actn3
                         (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
               ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                       F') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                  · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
              (maponpaths
                 (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F'
                         (act_odot actn2
                            (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                     F'
                       (F
                          (act_odot actn1
                             (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                        · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (λ p : A3
                           ⟦ F'
                               (act_odot actn2
                                  (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                           F'
                             (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                           ⟧,
                     p =
                     # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                     · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A3
                        ⟦ F'
                            (act_odot actn2
                               (F (...), pr2 av)),
                        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                        ⟧)
                       (# F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                           · # F (# (...) (...))))
                       (λ p : A3
                              ⟦ F'
                                  (act_odot actn2
                                     (..., ...)),
                              F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                        # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                        p)
                       (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                       (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                        · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                       (functor_comp F'
                          (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                          (# F
                             (# (act_odot actn1)
                                (...,, ...)))))
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                       (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
              (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                 (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                 (# F'
                    (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                          (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
        (assoc
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn3 (((F ∙ F') a, v), w)
· make_nat_trans
    (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
    (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
    (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
     ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
    (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
     (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
     let ζisnatinst :=
       nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
         (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
     let ζ'isnatinst :=
       nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (A3 ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
       (# (act_odot actn3)
          (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
        · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
       (# (act_odot actn3)
          (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
        · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
        · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
       (λ p : A3
              ⟦ act_odot actn3
                  (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
              F'
                (F
                   (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
              ⟧,
        p =
        ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
        · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
        · # F'
            (# F
               (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
       (cancel_postcomposition
          (# (act_odot actn3)
             (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
           · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
               (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
          (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
        internal_paths_rew
          (A3
           ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
               (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
           F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           ⟧)
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
              · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
          (λ p : A3
                 ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                     (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                 F'
                   (F
                      (act_odot actn1
                         (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
           p =
           ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
           · # F'
               (# F
                  (# (act_odot actn1)
                     (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
          (internal_paths_rew
             (A3
              ⟦ act_odot actn3
                  (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
              F'
                (F
                   (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
              ⟧)
             (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                 · # F'
                     (# F
                        (# (act_odot actn1)
                           (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
             (λ p : A3
                    ⟦ act_odot actn3
                        (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                    F'
                      (F
                         (act_odot actn1
                            (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
              ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                      F') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                 · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
             (maponpaths
                (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                (internal_paths_rew
                   (A3
                    ⟦ F'
                        (act_odot actn2
                           (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)),
                    F'
                      (F
                         (act_odot actn1
                            (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
                   (# F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                       · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                   (λ p : A3
                          ⟦ F'
                              (act_odot actn2
                                 (F ...,, pr2 av)),
                          F'
                            (F (act_odot actn1 (...)))
                          ⟧,
                    p =
                    # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                    · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                   (internal_paths_rew
                      (A3
                       ⟦ F'
                           (act_odot actn2
                              (F (...), pr2 av)),
                       F' (F (act_odot actn1 (...))) ⟧)
                      (# F'
                         (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
                          · # F (# (...) (...))))
                      (λ p : A3
                             ⟦ F'
                                 (act_odot actn2
                                    (..., ...)),
                             F' (F (...)) ⟧,
                       # F' (# (...) (...) · ζ (...)) =
                       p) (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                      (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                       · # F' (# F (# (...) (...))))
                      (functor_comp F'
                         (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                         (# F
                            (# (act_odot actn1)
                               (...,, ...)))))
                   (# F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                    · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                   (functor_comp F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                      (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
             (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
              · # F'
                  (# F
                     (# (act_odot actn1)
                        (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
             (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                (# F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
               (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
          (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
             (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
             (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
       (assoc
          (# (act_odot actn3)
             (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
          (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))) (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
     (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
     (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
      ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
      · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
     (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
      (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
      let ζisnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
          (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
      let ζ'isnatinst :=
        nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
          (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
          (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A3
         ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
         F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
        (# (act_odot actn3)
           (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
         · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
        (λ p : A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
         p =
         ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
         · # F'
             (# F
                (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
            · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
         internal_paths_rew
           (A3
            ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
            F'
              (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
            ⟧)
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
           (λ p : A3
                  ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                      (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                  F'
                    (F
                       (act_odot actn1
                          (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
            p =
            ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
            · # F'
                (# F
                   (# (act_odot actn1)
                      (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew
              (A3
               ⟦ act_odot actn3
                   (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
               F'
                 (F
                    (act_odot actn1
                       (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                  · # F'
                      (# F
                         (# (act_odot actn1)
                            (...,, ...)))))
              (λ p : A3
                     ⟦ act_odot actn3
                         (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                     F'
                       (F (act_odot actn1 (...,, ...)))
                     ⟧,
               ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                       F') (# F (...),, pr2 fg)
                  · # F' (ζ (...,, ...))) = p)
              (maponpaths
                 (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (A3
                     ⟦ F' (act_odot actn2 (...,, ...)),
                     F' (F (act_odot actn1 ...)) ⟧)
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2) (...,, ...)
                        · ζ (...,, ...)))
                    (λ p : A3
                           ⟦ F' (act_odot actn2 ...),
                           F' (F ...) ⟧,
                     p = # F' (ζ ...) · # F' (# F ...))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (A3 ⟦ F' (act_odot actn2 ...),
                        F' (F ...) ⟧)
                       (# F' (ζ ... · # F ...))
                       (λ p : A3 ⟦ F' ..., F' ... ⟧,
                        # F' (...) = p)
                       (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                       (# F' (ζ ...) · # F' (# F ...))
                       (functor_comp F' (ζ (...))
                          (# F (...))))
                    (# F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2) (...,, ...))
                     · # F' (ζ (...,, ...)))
                    (functor_comp F'
                       (# (act_odot actn2)
                          (# F ...,, pr2 fg))
                       (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
              (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
               · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
               · # F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
              (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                 (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                 (# F'
                    (# F
                       (# (act_odot actn1)
                          (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
            · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
            · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
              (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                 (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
              (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
        (assoc
           (# (act_odot actn3)
              (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
           (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
           (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))) (a, v)
  #, id w)
· make_nat_trans
    (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 (F ∙ F'))
    (actionbased_strength_codom actn1 (F ∙ F'))
    (λ av : A1 ⊠ Mon_V,
     ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
     · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
    (λ (av av' : A1 ⊠ Mon_V)
     (fg : A1 ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧),
     let ζisnatinst :=
       nat_trans_ax ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)
         (pr1 av',, pr2 av') (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg) in
     let ζ'isnatinst :=
       nat_trans_ax ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
         (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg) in
     internal_paths_rew_r
       (A3 ⟦ act_odot actn3 (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
        F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧)
       (# (act_odot actn3)
          (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
        · (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
       (# (act_odot actn3)
          (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
        · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av')
        · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
       (λ p : A3
              ⟦ act_odot actn3
                  (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
              F'
                (F
                   (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
              ⟧,
        p =
        ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
        · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
        · # F'
            (# F
               (# (act_odot actn1) (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
       (cancel_postcomposition
          (# (act_odot actn3)
             (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg)
           · ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
               (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
          (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ζ'isnatinst @
        internal_paths_rew
          (A3
           ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
               (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
           F' (F (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
           ⟧)
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
              · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))))
          (λ p : A3
                 ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F'
                     (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av),
                 F'
                   (F
                      (act_odot actn1
                         (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
           p =
           ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
           · # F'
               (# F
                  (# (act_odot actn1)
                     (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
          (internal_paths_rew
             (A3
              ⟦ act_odot actn3
                  (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
              F'
                (F
                   (act_odot actn1 (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
              ⟧)
             (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                 · # F'
                     (# F
                        (# (act_odot actn1)
                           (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg)))))
             (λ p : A3
                    ⟦ act_odot actn3
                        (F' (F (pr1 av)), pr2 av),
                    F'
                      (F
                         (act_odot actn1
                            (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) ⟧,
              ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2
                      F') (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
                 · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av'))) = p)
             (maponpaths
                (compose (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)))
                (internal_paths_rew
                   (A3
                    ⟦ F'
                        (act_odot actn2
                           (F (...),, pr2 av)),
                    F'
                      (F (act_odot actn1 (...,, ...)))
                    ⟧)
                   (# F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (...),, pr2 fg)
                       · ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                   (λ p : A3
                          ⟦ F'
                              (act_odot actn2
                                 (...,, ...)),
                          F' (F (act_odot actn1 ...))
                          ⟧,
                    p =
                    # F' (ζ (...,, ...))
                    · # F' (# F (# ... ...)))
                   (internal_paths_rew
                      (A3
                       ⟦ F'
                           (act_odot actn2
                              (F ..., pr2 av)),
                       F' (F (act_odot actn1 ...)) ⟧)
                      (# F'
                         (ζ (...,, ...)
                          · # F (# ... ...)))
                      (λ p : A3
                             ⟦ F' (act_odot actn2 ...),
                             F' (F ...) ⟧,
                       # F' (# ... ... · ζ ...) = p)
                      (maponpaths # F' ζisnatinst)
                      (# F' (ζ (...,, ...))
                       · # F' (# F (# ... ...)))
                      (functor_comp F'
                         (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
                         (# F (# (...) (...)))))
                   (# F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (...),, pr2 fg))
                    · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
                   (functor_comp F'
                      (# (act_odot actn2)
                         (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
                      (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
             (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
              · # F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av))
              · # F'
                  (# F
                     (# (act_odot actn1)
                        (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))
             (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
                (# F' (ζ (pr1 av,, pr2 av)))
                (# F'
                   (# F
                      (# (act_odot actn1)
                         (pr1 fg,, pr2 fg))))))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av)
           · # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
               (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg)
           · # F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))
          (assoc (ζ' (F (pr1 av),, pr2 av))
             (# (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
                (# F (pr1 fg),, pr2 fg))
             (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
       (assoc
          (# (act_odot actn3)
             (# F' (# F (pr1 fg)) #, pr2 fg))
          (ζ' (F (pr1 av'),, pr2 av'))
          (# F' (ζ (pr1 av',, pr2 av')))))
    (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # (F ∙ F') (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· (ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· (ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· (ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· (ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
?b =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· (ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w) · ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w)
· # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w)) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ'pentagoneqinst: χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w)
· ζ' (F a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
χ' actn3 ((F' (F a), v), w) · ζ' (F a,, v ⊗ w) = ?f'
 exact ζ'pentagoneqinst. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2

  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)

  (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)

# (act_odot actn3) (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w)) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w)) =
# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)

# (act_odot actn3)
  (ζ' (F a,, v) · # F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w · id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))

a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
?b =
# (act_odot actn3)
  ((ζ' (F a,, v) #, id w) · (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w))
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3

F': A2 ⟶ A3

ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
?f =
# (act_odot actn3)
  ((ζ' (F a,, v) #, id w) · (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w))

           apply pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
# (act_odot actn3) (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w)) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w)) =
# (act_odot actn3) (ζ' (F a,, v) #, id w)
· # (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w)))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
# (act_odot actn3) (ζ' (F a, v) #, id w)
· (ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
   · (# F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w))
      · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w)))) =
# (act_odot actn3) (ζ' (F a,, v) #, id w)
· (# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
   · (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
      · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
         · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))))))

# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)

   · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))

  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3

ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
?t2 =
# F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w)) · # F' (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))

        apply (functor_comp F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w)) (ζ (a,, v ⊗ w))).
