· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (χ actn2 ((F a, v), w) · ζ (a,, v ⊗ w)) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
χ actn2 ((F a, v), w) · ζ (a,, v ⊗ w) = ?t2
 apply ζpentagoneqinst. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζpentagoneqinst: χ' actn2 ((F a, v), w)
· ζ (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actn2)
  (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
· ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
     · ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
     · # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
      · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
     · ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
     · # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
      · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
     · ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
     · # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
?b =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
      · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)
     · ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w)
     · # F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· (# F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w))
   · # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w))
   · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))) = ?b
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w))
· # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) = ?b
 apply idpath. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w))
· # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· (ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
   · (# F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
      · # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w))
· # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v), w))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w))) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
· # F' (ζ (act_odot actn1 (a, v),, w))
· # F' (# F (χ actn1 ((a, v), w)))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (actionbased_strength_dom actn3 F')
  (ζ (a,, v),, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actn2 F')
    (ζ (a,, v),, id w)
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (act_odot actn3)
  (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)) =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (act_odot actn3)
  (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)) = ?b
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (act_odot actn3)
  (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))
?b =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (act_odot actn3)
  (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))
?b =
# (act_odot actn3) (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w)
 apply pathsinv0, ζ'natinst. 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A1, A2, A3: category
actn1: action Mon_V A1
actn2: action Mon_V A2
actn3: action Mon_V A3
F: A1 ⟶ A2
F': A2 ⟶ A3
ζ: actionbased_strength actn1 actn2 F
ζ': actionbased_strength actn2 actn3 F'
a: A1
v, w: Mon_V
ζ'natinst: # (act_odot actn3)
  (# F' (ζ (a,, v)) #, id w)
· ζ' (F (act_odot actn1 (a, v)),, w) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F'
    (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v), w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a, v) #, id w)) =
ζ' (act_odot actn2 (F a, v),, w)
· # F' (# (act_odot actn2) (ζ (a,, v),, id w))

      apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition actionbased_strong_functor {A A' : category} (actn : action Mon_V A)(actn' : action Mon_V A') : UU
  := ∑ (F : A ⟶ A'), actionbased_strength actn actn' F.

Definition actionbased_strong_functor_to_functor (A A' : category) (actn : action Mon_V A)(actn' : action Mon_V A') (FF : actionbased_strong_functor actn actn') : A ⟶ A' := pr1 FF.
Coercion actionbased_strong_functor_to_functor : actionbased_strong_functor >-> functor.

Definition ab_strong_functor_strength {A A' : category} (actn : action Mon_V A)(actn' : action Mon_V A')
           (FF : actionbased_strong_functor actn actn') : actionbased_strength_nat actn actn' FF
  := pr1 (pr2 FF).

(*
  The standard tensorial strength:
  F(A) ⊗ B --> F(A ⊗ B)
*)
Definition tensorial_strength : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V → UU := actionbased_strength (tensorial_action Mon_V) (tensorial_action Mon_V).

Section Alternative_Definition.
(** we continue in the spirit of the definition of actions given by Janelidze and Kelly, however we are not aware
    of this definition in the literature *)

  Context (A A' : category).

  Let Mon_EndA : monoidal_cat := monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A.
  Let Mon_EndA' : monoidal_cat := monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A'.

  Context (FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA).
  Context (FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA').

Section Param_Distr.

  Context (F : [A, A']).

  Local Definition precompF := pre_composition_functor _ A' A' F.
  Local Definition postcompF {C: category} := post_composition_functor C A A' F.

  (** a parameterized form of distributivity as strength *)
  Definition param_distributivity_dom : functor Mon_V [A, A'] :=
    functor_compose (pr11 FA') precompF.

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : Mon_V,
param_distributivity_dom v = functor_compose F (FA' v)

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : Mon_V,
param_distributivity_dom v = functor_compose F (FA' v)

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
v: Mon_V
param_distributivity_dom v = functor_compose F (FA' v)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition param_distributivity_codom : functor Mon_V [A, A'] :=
    functor_compose (pr11 FA) postcompF.

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : Mon_V,
param_distributivity_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

  
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : Mon_V,
param_distributivity_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
v: Mon_V
param_distributivity_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

    Definition parameterized_distributivity_nat : UU := param_distributivity_dom ⟹ param_distributivity_codom.

    Definition parameterized_distributivity_nat_funclass (δ : parameterized_distributivity_nat):
      ∏ v : ob (Mon_V), param_distributivity_dom v --> param_distributivity_codom v
      := pr1 δ.
    Coercion parameterized_distributivity_nat_funclass : parameterized_distributivity_nat >-> Funclass.

Section The_Laws.

  Context (δ : parameterized_distributivity_nat).

  Definition param_distr_triangle_eq : UU :=
      # precompF (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ FA') · (δ I) = # postcompF (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ FA).

    (** the type of the following def. is the same as that of [δ I], as seen from the definition that comes
        directly afterwards *)
  Definition param_distr_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS :
    [A, A'] ⟦ precompF (FA' (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V)), postcompF (FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V)) ⟧ :=
    # precompF (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA') · # postcompF (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ FA).

    Definition param_distr_triangle_eq_variant0 : UU := δ I = param_distr_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS.

    Definition param_distr_triangle_eq_variant : UU :=
      (δ I) · (# postcompF (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA))  =
      # precompF (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA').

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
z_iso
  (postcompF (FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V)))
  (postcompF (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA))

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
z_iso
  (postcompF (FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V)))
  (postcompF (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA))

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
z_iso (FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V))
  (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
[A, A] ⟦ FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V),
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA ⟧
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
(λ f : [A, A]
       ⟦ FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V),
       MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f) ?pr1

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
[A, A] ⟦ FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V),
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA ⟧
 exact (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA).
      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
(λ f : [A, A]
       ⟦ FA (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V),
       MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
is_z_isomorphism (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA)

        apply is_z_isomorphism_inv.
    Defined.

z_iso
  (precompF (FA' (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C Mon_V)))
  (precompF (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D Mon_EndA'))

inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso · δ I =
# postcompF (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ FA)

inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso · δ I

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),
postcompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧

dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,

dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),

  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧

aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']

⟦ precompF

aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity_dom v),

  (param_distributivity_codom v) ⟧

dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity_codom v) ⟧
aux2:= # (pre_comp_functor (FA v)) dw: [A, A']
⟦ pre_comp_functor (FA v)
    (param_distributivity_dom w),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity_codom w) ⟧
aux3:= # postcompF (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)): [A, A']
⟦ postcompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
       (v,, w)),
postcompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),
postcompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity_codom v) ⟧
aux2:= # (pre_comp_functor (FA v)) dw: [A, A']
⟦ pre_comp_functor (FA v)
    (param_distributivity_dom w),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity_codom w) ⟧
aux3:= # postcompF (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)): [A, A']
⟦ postcompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
       (v,, w)),
postcompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧
auxr:= aux1 · aux2: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity_dom v),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity_codom w) ⟧
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),
postcompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
     (v,, w)) ⟧

      exact (auxr · aux3).
    Defined.

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
UU

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
UU

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
aux:= # precompF (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)): [A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA'
       FA' (v,, w)),
precompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA'
     FA' (v,, w)) ⟧
UU

      exact (aux · δ (v ⊗ w) = param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)).
    Defined.

    Definition param_distr_pentagon_eq : UU := ∏ (v w : Mon_V), param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w.

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom (v ⊗ w),
param_distributivity_codom (v ⊗ w) ⟧

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom (v ⊗ w),
param_distributivity_codom (v ⊗ w) ⟧

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom v,
param_distributivity_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom w,
param_distributivity_codom w ⟧
aux1inv:= # precompF
  (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w)): [A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V
       Mon_EndA' FA' (v,, w)),
precompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA'
     FA' (v,, w)) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity_dom (v ⊗ w),
param_distributivity_codom (v ⊗ w) ⟧

      exact (aux1inv · (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w dv dw)).
    Defined.

    Definition param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_variant (v w : Mon_V): UU :=
      δ (v ⊗ w) = param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w).

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
z_iso
  (precompF
     (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
        (v,, w)))
  (precompF
     (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
        (v,, w)))

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat

δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat

z_iso
  (precompF
     (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
        (v,, w)))
  (precompF
     (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
        (v,, w)))

A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat

δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),
precompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
     (v,, w)) ⟧
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
(λ f : [A, A']
       ⟦ precompF
           (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA'
              FA' (v,, w)),
       precompF
         (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
            (v,, w)) ⟧, 
 is_z_isomorphism f) ?pr1

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
[A, A']
⟦ precompF
    (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
       (v,, w)),
precompF
  (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
     (v,, w)) ⟧
 exact (# precompF (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,,w))).
      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat

v, w: Mon_V
(λ f : [A, A']
       ⟦ precompF
           (monoidal_functor_map_codom Mon_V Mon_EndA'
              FA' (v,, w)),
       precompF
         (monoidal_functor_map_dom Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
            (v,, w)) ⟧, is_z_isomorphism f)
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w)))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat

v, w: Mon_V
is_z_isomorphism

     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w)))

        
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category

δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
is_z_isomorphism
  (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w))

        apply is_z_isomorphism_inv.
    Defined.

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category

param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w
→ param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w

# precompF (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w))
· param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat

δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w
inv_from_z_iso (prewhisker_with_μ_inv_z_iso v w)
· δ (v ⊗ w) =
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.

param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w
→ param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w

v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: δ (v ⊗ w) =
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS v w
  (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: δ (v ⊗ w) =
# precompF
  (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv FA' (v,, w))
· param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w 
    (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: inv_from_z_iso (prewhisker_with_μ_inv_z_iso v w)
· δ (v ⊗ w) =
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.


    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop param_distr_triangle_eq

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop param_distr_triangle_eq

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop param_distr_pentagon_eq

    
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat

FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop param_distr_pentagon_eq

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isofhlevel 1 param_distr_pentagon_eq

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v: Mon_V
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ w : Mon_V, param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w)

      
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
v, w: Mon_V
isofhlevel 1 (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body v w)

      apply isaset_nat_trans, homset_property.
    Qed.

End The_Laws.

   Definition parameterized_distributivity : UU := ∑ (δ : parameterized_distributivity_nat),
     (param_distr_triangle_eq δ) × (param_distr_pentagon_eq δ).

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ' → sδ = sδ'

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ' → sδ = sδ'

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
sδ = sδ'

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
isPredicate
  (λ x : parameterized_distributivity_nat,
   param_distr_triangle_eq x
   × param_distr_pentagon_eq x)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop
  (param_distr_triangle_eq δ
   × param_distr_pentagon_eq δ)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop (param_distr_triangle_eq δ)
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop (param_distr_pentagon_eq δ)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop (param_distr_triangle_eq δ)
 apply isaprop_param_distr_triangle_eq.
     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity_nat
isaprop (param_distr_pentagon_eq δ)
 apply isaprop_param_distr_pentagon_eq.
   Qed.

Definition parameterized_distributivity_to_nat (sδ : parameterized_distributivity) :
  parameterized_distributivity_nat
  := pr1 sδ.
Coercion parameterized_distributivity_to_nat : parameterized_distributivity >-> parameterized_distributivity_nat.

Identity Coercion parameterized_distributivity_nat_to_nat_trans : parameterized_distributivity_nat >-> nat_trans.


   Context (sδ : parameterized_distributivity).

   Let δ_triangle_eq : param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ) := pr1 (pr2 sδ).
   Let δ_pentagon_eq : param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ) := pr2 (pr2 sδ).
   Let actionA : action Mon_V A := action_from_alt Mon_V A FA.
   Let actionA' : action Mon_V A':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA'.

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F
⟹ uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F
⟹ uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
nat_trans_data (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F)
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom)
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
is_nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F)
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom)
  ?t

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
nat_trans_data (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F)
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av: A ⊠ Mon_V
A' ⟦ actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F av,
uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom av
⟧

       apply identity.
     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
is_nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F)
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom)
  ((λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
    id uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
         param_distributivity_dom av)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F)
     (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
        param_distributivity_dom))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F) fg
· id uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
       param_distributivity_dom av' =
id uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom
     av
· # (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
       param_distributivity_dom) fg

       
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (FA' (pr2 av)) (# F (pr1 fg))
· pr1 (# FA' (pr2 fg)) (F (pr1 av'))
· id (pr11 FA') (pr2 av') (F (pr1 av')) =
id (pr11 FA') (pr2 av) (F (pr1 av))
· (# ((pr11 FA') (pr2 av)) (# F (pr1 fg))
   · pr1 (# (pr11 FA') (pr2 fg)) (pr1 F (pr1 av')))

       
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (FA' (pr2 av)) (# F (pr1 fg))
· pr1 (# FA' (pr2 fg)) (F (pr1 av')) =
# ((pr11 FA') (pr2 av)) (# F (pr1 fg))
· pr1 (# (pr11 FA') (pr2 fg)) (pr1 F (pr1 av'))

       apply idpath.
   Defined.

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_codom
⟹ actionbased_strength_codom actionA F

actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_codom
⟹ actionbased_strength_codom actionA F

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
nat_trans_data
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
     param_distributivity_codom)
  (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F)
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
is_nat_trans
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
     param_distributivity_codom)
  (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F) 
  ?t

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category

Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
nat_trans_data
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
     param_distributivity_codom)
  (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F)
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av: A ⊠ Mon_V
A'
⟦ uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
    param_distributivity_codom av,
actionbased_strength_codom actionA F av ⟧

       apply identity.
     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
is_nat_trans
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
     param_distributivity_codom)
  (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F)
  ((λ av : A ⊠ Mon_V,
    id actionbased_strength_codom actionA F av)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
        param_distributivity_codom)
     (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F))
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
     param_distributivity_codom) fg
· id actionbased_strength_codom actionA F av' =
id actionbased_strength_codom actionA F av
· # (actionbased_strength_codom actionA F) fg

       
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# F (# ((pr11 FA) (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 (# (pr11 FA) (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av'))
· id F (pr1 (FA (pr2 av')) (pr1 av')) =
id F (pr1 (FA (pr2 av)) (pr1 av))
· # F
    (# (FA (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg)
     · pr1 (# FA (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av'))

       
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# F (# ((pr11 FA) (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 (# (pr11 FA) (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av')) =
# F
  (# (FA (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg)
   · pr1 (# FA (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av'))

       
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
av, av': A ⊠ Mon_V
fg: A ⊠ Mon_V ⟦ av, av' ⟧
# F
  (# (FA (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg)
   · pr1 (# FA (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av')) =
# F (# ((pr11 FA) (pr2 av)) (pr1 fg))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 (# (pr11 FA) (pr2 fg)) (pr1 av'))

       apply functor_comp.
   Defined.

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_nat actionA actionA' F

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_nat actionA actionA' F

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat

FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'

sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_dom actionA' F
⟹ actionbased_strength_codom actionA F

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat

FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']

⟹ actionbased_strength_codom actionA F

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom
⟹ uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
    param_distributivity_codom

     exact (uncurry_nattrans _ _ _ sδ).
   Defined.

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
∏ a : A,
strength_nat_from_alt (a, I) · # F (ϱ actionA a) =
ϱ' actionA' (F a)

δ_triangle_eq: param_distr_triangle_eq_variant
  (pr1 sδ)

actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq: pr1 sδ I
· # postcompF
    (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA) =
# precompF
  (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv FA')
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
strength_nat_from_alt (a, I) · # F (ϱ actionA a) =
ϱ' actionA' (F a)

A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat

FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq: pr1
  (pr1 sδ I
   · # postcompF
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
          FA)) =
pr1
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
        FA'))
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A

sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq: pr1
  (pr1 sδ I
   · # postcompF
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
          FA)) ~
pr1
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
        FA'))
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq: pr1
  (pr1 sδ I
   · # postcompF
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
          FA)) ~
pr1
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
        FA'))

actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1
  (pr1 sδ I
   · # postcompF
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
          FA)) a =
pr1
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
        FA')) a
strength_nat_from_alt (a, I) · # F (ϱ actionA a) =
ϱ' actionA' (F a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1
  (pr1 sδ I
   · # postcompF
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
          FA)) a =
pr1
  (# precompF
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv
        FA')) a
strength_nat_from_alt (a, I) · # F (ϱ actionA a) =

Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1 sδ I a
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
             FA)) a) =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
        FA')) (pr1 F a)
strength_nat_from_alt (a, I) · # F (ϱ actionA a) =
ϱ' actionA' (F a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1 sδ I a
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
             FA)) a) =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
        FA')) (pr1 F a)
nat_trans_comp
  (actionbased_strength_dom
     (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') F)
  (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A' param_distributivity_dom)
  (actionbased_strength_codom
     (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
  strength_nat_from_alt_aux_dom
  (nat_trans_comp
     (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
        param_distributivity_dom)
     (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
        param_distributivity_codom)
     (actionbased_strength_codom
        (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
     (uncurry_nattrans A Mon_V A' sδ)
     strength_nat_from_alt_aux_codom) (a, I)
· # F (ϱ (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) a) =
ϱ' (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') (F a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1 sδ I a
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
             FA)) a) =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
        FA')) (pr1 F a)
id (pr11 FA') I (F a)
· (pr1 (sδ I) a · id F (pr1 (FA I) a))
· # F
    (id FA (Actions.I Mon_V) a
     · is_z_isomorphism_mor
         (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA) a) =
id FA' (Actions.I Mon_V) (F a)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA') (F a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1 sδ I a
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
             FA)) a) =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
        FA')) (pr1 F a)
pr1 (sδ I) a · id F (pr1 (FA I) a)
· # F
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA) a) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA') (F a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
δ_triangle_eq_inst: pr1 sδ I a
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
             FA)) a) =
pr1
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso
        FA')) (pr1 F a)
pr1 (sδ I) a
· # F
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA) a) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso FA') (F a)

     exact δ_triangle_eq_inst.
   Qed.

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
∏ (a : A) (v w : Mon_V),
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

a: A
v, w: Mon_V
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

A, A': category
