actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: param_distr_pentagon_eq_body (pr1 sδ) v w
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: # precompF (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
· pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) =
param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w 
  (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w)
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: pr1
  (# precompF
     (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
   · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w)) =
pr1
  (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w
     (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w))
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: pr1
  (# precompF
     (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
   · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w)) ~
pr1
  (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w
     (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w))
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hyp: pr1
  (# precompF
     (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
   · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w)) ~
pr1
  (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w
     (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w))
Hypinst: pr1
  (# precompF
     (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
   · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
pr1
  (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w
     (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w)) a
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1
  (# precompF
     (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
   · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
pr1
  (param_distr_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w
     (pr1 sδ v) (pr1 sδ w)) a
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
χ' actionA' ((F a, v), w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot actionA')
  (strength_nat_from_alt (a, v) #, id w)
· strength_nat_from_alt (act_odot actionA (a, v), w)
· # F (χ actionA ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
χ' (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') ((F a, v), w)
· nat_trans_comp
    (actionbased_strength_dom
       (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') F)
    (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
       param_distributivity_dom)
    (actionbased_strength_codom
       (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
    strength_nat_from_alt_aux_dom
    (nat_trans_comp
       (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
          param_distributivity_dom)
       (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
          param_distributivity_codom)
       (actionbased_strength_codom
          (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
       (uncurry_nattrans A Mon_V A' sδ)
       strength_nat_from_alt_aux_codom) (a, v ⊗ w) =
# (act_odot (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA'))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (actionbased_strength_dom
        (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') F)
     (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
        param_distributivity_dom)
     (actionbased_strength_codom
        (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
     strength_nat_from_alt_aux_dom
     (nat_trans_comp
        (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
           param_distributivity_dom)
        (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
           param_distributivity_codom)
        (actionbased_strength_codom
           (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
        (uncurry_nattrans A Mon_V A' sδ)
        strength_nat_from_alt_aux_codom) (a, v)
  #, id w)
· nat_trans_comp
    (actionbased_strength_dom
       (action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA') F)
    (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
       param_distributivity_dom)
    (actionbased_strength_codom
       (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
    strength_nat_from_alt_aux_dom
    (nat_trans_comp
       (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
          param_distributivity_dom)
       (uncurry_functor A Mon_V A'
          param_distributivity_codom)
       (actionbased_strength_codom
          (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) F)
       (uncurry_nattrans A Mon_V A' sδ)
       strength_nat_from_alt_aux_codom)
    (act_odot (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) (a, v), w)
· # F (χ (action_from_alt Mon_V A FA) ((a, v), w))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
id FA' w (FA' v (F a))
· (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
   · id pr1 (FA' (Actions.tensor Mon_V (v,, w))) (F a))
· (id (pr11 FA') (v ⊗ w) (F a)
   · (pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a · id F (pr1 (FA (v ⊗ w)) a))) =
# (FA' w)
  (id (pr11 FA') v (F a)
   · (pr1 (sδ v) a · id F (pr1 (FA v) a)))
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· (id (pr11 FA') w (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
   · (pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
      · id F (pr1 (FA w) (pr1 (FA v) a))))
· # F
    (id FA w (FA v a)
     · (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a
        · id pr1 (FA (Actions.tensor Mon_V (v,, w))) a))

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· id pr1 (FA' (Actions.tensor Mon_V (v,, w))) (F a)
· (pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a · id F (pr1 (FA (v ⊗ w)) a)) =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a · id F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· (pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
   · id F (pr1 (FA w) (pr1 (FA v) a)))
· # F
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a
     · id pr1 (FA (Actions.tensor Mon_V (v,, w))) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a)
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
aux: # FA' (id w) = id FA' w
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a)
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
aux: pr1 (# FA' (id w)) = pr1 (id FA' w)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a)
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
aux: pr1 (# FA' (id w)) ~ pr1 (id FA' w)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a)
· pr1 (# FA' (id w)) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
aux: pr1 (# FA' (id w)) ~ pr1 (id FA' w)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a)
· pr1 (id FA' w) (F (pr1 (FA v) a))
· pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
a: A
v, w: Mon_V
Hypinst: pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w))
  (pr1 F a) · pr1 sδ (v ⊗ w) a =
# (pr1 (FA' w)) (pr1 (pr1 sδ v) a)
· pr1 (pr1 sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w))
       a)
aux: pr1 (# FA' (id w)) ~ pr1 (id FA' w)
pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA' (v,, w)) (F a)
· pr1 (sδ (v ⊗ w)) a =
# (FA' w) (pr1 (sδ v) a) · pr1 (sδ w) (pr1 (FA v) a)
· # F (pr1 (lax_monoidal_functor_μ FA (v,, w)) a)

     exact Hypinst.
   Qed.

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strong_functor actionA actionA'

   
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strong_functor actionA actionA'

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength actionA actionA' F
 
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt
× actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actionA actionA' F
    strength_nat_from_alt

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt

     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt
 exact triangle_eq_from_alt.
     
Mon_V: monoidal_cat
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A: monoidal_cat
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_cat_of_endofunctors A': monoidal_cat
FA: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA
FA': strong_monoidal_functor Mon_V Mon_EndA'
F: [A, A']
sδ: parameterized_distributivity
δ_triangle_eq:= pr12 sδ: param_distr_triangle_eq (pr1 sδ)
δ_pentagon_eq:= pr22 sδ: param_distr_pentagon_eq (pr1 sδ)
actionA:= action_from_alt Mon_V A FA: action Mon_V A
actionA':= action_from_alt Mon_V A' FA': action Mon_V A'
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq actionA actionA' F
  strength_nat_from_alt
 exact pentagon_eq_from_alt.
   Defined.

End Param_Distr.

End Alternative_Definition.

End A.


Section Alternative_Definition_Whiskered.
  Import BifunctorNotations.
  Import MonoidalNotations.

  Context {V : category}.
  Context (Mon_V : monoidal V).

  Notation "X ⊗ Y" := (X ⊗_{ Mon_V } Y).

  Context (A A' : category).

  Let Mon_EndA : monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A) := monoidal_of_endofunctors A.
  Let Mon_EndA' : monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A') := monoidal_of_endofunctors A'.

  Context {FA: functor V (cat_of_endofunctors A)}.
  Context {FA': functor V (cat_of_endofunctors A')}.

  Context (FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA).
  Context (FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA').

Section Param_Distr.

  Context (F : [A, A']).

  (** the expected definitions:
  Local Definition precomp'F := pre_composition_functor _ A' A' F.
  Local Definition postcomp'F {C: category} := post_composition_functor C A A' F.
   *)

  (** the definitions that are more compatible with the bicategorical scenario
  Local Definition precomp'F := functor_fix_fst_arg _ _ _ (functorial_composition _ _ A') F.
  Local Definition postcomp'F {C: category} := functor_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ (functorial_composition C _ A') F.
   *)

  (** the definitions that force full compatibility with the bicategorical scenario *)
  Local Definition precomp'F := UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.lwhisker_functor(C:=UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.bicat_of_cats)(c:=A') F.
  Local Definition postcomp'F {C: category} := UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.rwhisker_functor(C:=UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.bicat_of_cats)(a:=C)(c:=A') F.

  (** a parameterized form of distributivity as strength *)
  Definition param_distributivity'_dom : functor V [A, A'] :=
    functor_compose FA' precomp'F.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : V,
param_distributivity'_dom v =
functor_compose F (FA' v)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : V,
param_distributivity'_dom v =
functor_compose F (FA' v)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
v: V
param_distributivity'_dom v =
functor_compose F (FA' v)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition param_distributivity'_codom : functor V [A, A'] :=
    functor_compose FA postcomp'F.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : V,
param_distributivity'_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
∏ v : V,
param_distributivity'_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
v: V
param_distributivity'_codom v =
functor_compose (FA v) F

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition parameterized_distributivity'_nat : UU := param_distributivity'_dom ⟹ param_distributivity'_codom.

  Definition parameterized_distributivity'_nat_funclass (δ : parameterized_distributivity'_nat):
    ∏ v : V, param_distributivity'_dom v --> param_distributivity'_codom v
    := pr1 δ.
  Coercion parameterized_distributivity'_nat_funclass : parameterized_distributivity'_nat >-> Funclass.

Section The_Laws.

  Context (δ : parameterized_distributivity'_nat).

  Definition param_distr'_triangle_eq : UU :=
      # precomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm) · (δ I_{Mon_V}) = # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm).

    (** the type of the following def. is the same as that of [δ I_{Mon_V}], as seen from the definition that comes
        directly afterwards *)
  Definition param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS :
    [A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' I_{ Mon_V}), postcomp'F (FA I_{ Mon_V}) ⟧ :=
    # precomp'F (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm)) · # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm).

    Definition param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0 : UU := δ I_{Mon_V} = param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
z_iso (precomp'F (FA' I_{ Mon_V}))
  (precomp'F I_{ Mon_EndA'})

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
z_iso (precomp'F (FA' I_{ Mon_V}))
  (precomp'F I_{ Mon_EndA'})

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
z_iso (FA' I_{ Mon_V}) I_{ Mon_EndA'}

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
hom A' A' ⟦ FA' I_{ Mon_V}, I_{ Mon_EndA'} ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
(λ f : hom A' A' ⟦ FA' I_{ Mon_V}, I_{ Mon_EndA'} ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f) ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
hom A' A' ⟦ FA' I_{ Mon_V}, I_{ Mon_EndA'} ⟧
 exact (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm)).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
(λ f : hom A' A' ⟦ FA' I_{ Mon_V}, I_{ Mon_EndA'} ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))

        apply is_z_isomorphism_inv.
    Defined.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
param_distr'_triangle_eq
→ param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'

δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
param_distr'_triangle_eq
→ param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: param_distr'_triangle_eq
param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'

δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: param_distr'_triangle_eq
δ I_{ Mon_V} = param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: param_distr'_triangle_eq
δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# precomp'F
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
· # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm) =
# precomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm)
· δ I_{ Mon_V}
δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# precomp'F
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
· # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm) =
# precomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm)
· δ I_{ Mon_V}
inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso'
· δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm) =
# precomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm)
· δ I_{ Mon_V}
# postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm) =
inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso'
· δ I_{ Mon_V}

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0
→ param_distr'_triangle_eq

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0
→ param_distr'_triangle_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0
param_distr'_triangle_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: δ I_{ Mon_V} =
param_distr'_triangle_eq_variant0_RHS
param_distr'_triangle_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# precomp'F
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly FA'm))
· # postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)
param_distr'_triangle_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso'
· δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)
param_distr'_triangle_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
Hyp: inv_from_z_iso prewhisker_with_ϵ_inv_z_iso'
· δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)
# precomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FA'm)
· δ I_{ Mon_V} =
# postcomp'F (fmonoidal_preservesunit FAm)

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.

    (** we also abstract over the constituent distributivities *)
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity'_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity'_codom v) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity'_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity'_codom v) ⟧
aux2:= # (pre_comp_functor (FA v)) dw: [A, A']
⟦ pre_comp_functor (FA v)
    (param_distributivity'_dom w),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity'_codom w) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity'_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity'_codom v) ⟧
aux2:= # (pre_comp_functor (FA v)) dw: [A, A']
⟦ pre_comp_functor (FA v)
    (param_distributivity'_dom w),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity'_codom w) ⟧
aux3:= # postcomp'F
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w): hom A A'
⟦ postcomp'F (FA v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA} FA w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
aux1:= # (post_comp_functor (FA' w)) dv: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity'_dom v),
post_comp_functor (FA' w)
  (param_distributivity'_codom v) ⟧
aux2:= # (pre_comp_functor (FA v)) dw: [A, A']
⟦ pre_comp_functor (FA v)
    (param_distributivity'_dom w),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity'_codom w) ⟧
aux3:= # postcomp'F
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FAm v w): hom A A'
⟦ postcomp'F (FA v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA} FA w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧
auxr:= aux1 · aux2: [A, A']
⟦ post_comp_functor (FA' w)
    (param_distributivity'_dom v),
pre_comp_functor (FA v)
  (param_distributivity'_codom w) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
postcomp'F (FA (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧

      exact (auxr · aux3).
    Defined.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
UU

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
UU

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
aux:= # precomp'F
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata FA'm v w): hom A A'
⟦ precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w),
precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)) ⟧
UU

      exact (aux · δ (v ⊗ w) = param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)).
    Defined.

    Definition param_distr'_pentagon_eq : UU := ∏ (v w : V), param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w),
param_distributivity'_codom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w),
param_distributivity'_codom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
dv: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom v,
param_distributivity'_codom v ⟧
dw: [A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom w,
param_distributivity'_codom w ⟧
aux1inv:= # precomp'F
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm
        v w)): hom A A' ⟦ precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)),
precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w) ⟧
[A, A'] ⟦ param_distributivity'_dom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w),
param_distributivity'_codom (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) ⟧

      exact (aux1inv · (param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w dv dw)).
    Defined.

    Definition param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant (v w : V): UU :=
      δ (v ⊗ w) = param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w).

    Definition param_distr'_pentagon_eq_variant: UU :=
      ∏ (v w : V), param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
z_iso (precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
  (precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
z_iso (precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)))
  (precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
hom A A' ⟦ precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)),
precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w) ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
(λ f : hom A A' ⟦ precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)),
       precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f) ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
hom A A' ⟦ precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)),
precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w) ⟧
 exact (# precomp'F (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
(λ f : hom A A' ⟦ precomp'F (FA' (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w)),
       precomp'F (FA' v ⊗_{ Mon_EndA'} FA' w) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  (# precomp'F
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
is_z_isomorphism
  (# precomp'F
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w)))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))

        apply is_z_isomorphism_inv.
    Defined.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
→ param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
→ param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS v w (δ v)
  (δ w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
# precomp'F
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))
· param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w
inv_from_z_iso (prewhisker_with_μ_inv_z_iso' v w)
· δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w (δ v) (δ w)

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant v w
→ param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)

→ param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_variant_RHS v w
  (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
# precomp'F
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly FA'm v w))
· param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w 
    (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
Hyp: inv_from_z_iso
  (prewhisker_with_μ_inv_z_iso' v w)
· δ (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w) =
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body_RHS v w 
  (δ v) (δ w)
param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w

      exact Hyp.
    Qed.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop param_distr'_triangle_eq

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'

δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop param_distr'_triangle_eq

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

isaprop param_distr'_pentagon_eq

    
V: category

A, A': category

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category

FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isofhlevel 1 param_distr'_pentagon_eq

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')

FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'

FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v: V
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ w : V, param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
v, w: V
isofhlevel 1 (param_distr'_pentagon_eq_body v w)

      apply isaset_nat_trans, homset_property.
    Qed.

End The_Laws.

   Definition parameterized_distributivity' : UU := ∑ (δ : parameterized_distributivity'_nat),
     (param_distr'_triangle_eq δ) × (param_distr'_pentagon_eq δ).

   
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ' → sδ = sδ'

   
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ' → sδ = sδ'

     
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
sδ = sδ'

     
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
isPredicate
  (λ x : parameterized_distributivity'_nat,
   param_distr'_triangle_eq x
   × param_distr'_pentagon_eq x)

     
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop
  (param_distr'_triangle_eq δ
   × param_distr'_pentagon_eq δ)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop (param_distr'_triangle_eq δ)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop (param_distr'_pentagon_eq δ)

     
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop (param_distr'_triangle_eq δ)
 apply isaprop_param_distr'_triangle_eq.
     
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
A, A': category
Mon_EndA:= monoidal_of_endofunctors A: monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A)
Mon_EndA':= monoidal_of_endofunctors A': monoidal (cat_of_endofunctors A')
FA: V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A
FA': V ⟶ cat_of_endofunctors A'
FAm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA FA
FA'm: fmonoidal Mon_V Mon_EndA' FA'
F: [A, A']
sδ, sδ': parameterized_distributivity'
Heq: pr1 sδ = pr1 sδ'
δ: parameterized_distributivity'_nat
isaprop (param_distr'_pentagon_eq δ)
 apply isaprop_param_distr'_pentagon_eq.
   Qed.

Definition parameterized_distributivity'_to_nat (sδ : parameterized_distributivity') :
  parameterized_distributivity'_nat
  := pr1 sδ.
Coercion parameterized_distributivity'_to_nat : parameterized_distributivity' >-> parameterized_distributivity'_nat.

Identity Coercion parameterized_distributivity'_nat_to_nat_trans : parameterized_distributivity'_nat >-> nat_trans.

End Param_Distr.
End Alternative_Definition_Whiskered.

Section B.
(** following the TYPES'15 post-proceedings paper by Ahrens and Matthes - will be identified as an instance of the previous *)

  Context {Mon_W Mon_V : monoidal_cat}.

  Local Definition timesV := monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V.
  Local Definition lambda := monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V.
  Local Definition alpha := monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V.

  Local Definition timesW := monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W.

  Context (U : strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V).

Section RelativeStrengths_Natural_Transformation.
  Context (F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V).

  Notation "X ⊗V Y" := (timesV (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X •W Y" := (timesW (X , Y)) (at level 31).

  Notation "f #⊗V g" := (#timesV (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #•W g" := (#timesW (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  Definition rel_strength_dom : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V :=
    functor_composite (pair_functor U F) timesV.

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
rel_strength_dom =
(λ ax : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V, U (ob1 ax) ⊗V F (ob2 ax))

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
rel_strength_dom =
(λ ax : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V, U (ob1 ax) ⊗V F (ob2 ax))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition rel_strength_codom : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V :=
  functor_composite (functor_composite (pair_functor U (functor_identity _)) timesV) F.

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
rel_strength_codom =
(λ ax : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V, F (U (ob1 ax) ⊗V ob2 ax))

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
rel_strength_codom =
(λ ax : Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V, F (U (ob1 ax) ⊗V ob2 ax))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition rel_strength_nat : UU := nat_trans rel_strength_dom rel_strength_codom.

  Definition rel_strength_nat_funclass (ϛ : rel_strength_nat):
  ∏ x : ob (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_V), rel_strength_dom x --> rel_strength_codom x
  := pr1 ϛ.
  Coercion rel_strength_nat_funclass : rel_strength_nat >-> Funclass.

  (** the following looks like a pentagon but is of the nature of a triangle equation *)
  Definition rel_strength_pentagon_eq (ϛ : rel_strength_nat) :=
    ∏ (v : Mon_V), ϛ (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v) · #F (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #⊗V identity v) · #F (lambda v)  =
               strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #⊗V identity (F v) · lambda (F v).

  (** the following looks like a rectangle in the paper but is of the nature of a pentagon equation *)
  Definition rel_strength_rectangle_eq (ϛ : rel_strength_nat): UU := ∏ (w w' : Mon_W), ∏ (v : Mon_V),
  ϛ (w •W w', v) · #F (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w') #⊗V identity v) · #F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
  strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w') #⊗V identity (F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v) ·
                                        identity (U w) #⊗V ϛ (w', v) · ϛ (w, U w' ⊗V v).

End RelativeStrengths_Natural_Transformation.

Definition rel_strength (F : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V): UU :=
  ∑ (ϛ : rel_strength_nat F), (rel_strength_pentagon_eq F ϛ) × (rel_strength_rectangle_eq F ϛ).


Definition rel_strength_to_rel_strength_nat {F : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V} (str : rel_strength F) :
  rel_strength_nat F
  := pr1 str.
Coercion rel_strength_to_rel_strength_nat : rel_strength >-> rel_strength_nat.

(* Definition rel_strength_to_nat_trans {F : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V} (str : rel_strength F) :
  nat_trans (rel_strength_dom F) (rel_strength_codom F)
  := pr1 str.
Coercion rel_strength_to_nat_trans : rel_strength >-> nat_trans. *)

Identity Coercion rel_strength_nat_to_nat_trans : rel_strength_nat >-> nat_trans.

Definition rel_strength_pentagon {F : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V} (str : rel_strength F) :
  rel_strength_pentagon_eq F str
  := pr1 (pr2 str).

Definition rel_strength_rectangle {F : Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V} (str : rel_strength F) :
  rel_strength_rectangle_eq F str
  := pr2 (pr2 str).

Section RelativeStrength_Is_An_ActionBasedStrength.

  Context (F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V) (str: rel_strength F).

  Local Definition pentagon := rel_strength_pentagon str.
  Local Definition rectangle := rel_strength_rectangle str.

  Local Definition Mon_W' := swapping_of_monoidal_cat Mon_W.
  Local Definition timesW' := monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W'.
  Local Definition Mon_V' := swapping_of_monoidal_cat Mon_V.
  Local Definition timesV' := monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V'.

  Local Definition U' := swapping_of_strong_monoidal_functor U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W' Mon_V'.
  Local Definition phiinv' := pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U).

  Local Definition UAct := U_action Mon_W' U': action Mon_W' Mon_V'.

  Local Definition ϛ' := pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor str.


Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F


Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_W' UAct UAct F ϛ'
× actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_W' UAct UAct F
    ϛ'

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_W' UAct UAct F ϛ'

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_W' UAct UAct F ϛ'

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_W' UAct UAct F ϛ'
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
∏ a : Mon_V',
ϛ' (a, I Mon_W') · # F (ϱ Mon_W' UAct a) =
ϱ' Mon_W' UAct (F a)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
∏ a : Mon_V,
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, a)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id a)
     · monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V a) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id F a)
· monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V (F a)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V v) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V (F v)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
str (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v)
     · lambda v) =
# timesV (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id F v)
· lambda (F v)

F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V

v: Mon_V

· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v)
     · lambda v) =
str (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v))
· # F (lambda v)

F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V

v: Mon_V

· # F
    (# timesV

     · lambda v) =
str (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v)
· (# F

   · # F (lambda v))
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat

v: Mon_V

· (# F
     (# timesV
        (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v))
   · # F (lambda v)) =

· (# F
     (# timesV
        (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v))
   · # F (lambda v))

    apply idpath.

Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
∏ (a : Mon_V) (v w : Mon_W'),
ϛ' (a, tensor Mon_W' (v,, w))
· # F
    (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (χ Mon_W' UAct)
       ((a, v), w)) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (χ' Mon_W' UAct) ((F a, v), w)
· # (act_odot UAct) (ϛ' (a, v) #, id w)
· ϛ' (act_odot UAct (a, v), w)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
ϛ' (v, tensor Mon_W' (w',, w))
· # F
    (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (χ Mon_W' UAct)
       ((v, w'), w)) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (χ' Mon_W' UAct) ((F v, w'), w)
· # (act_odot UAct) (ϛ' (v, w') #, id w)
· ϛ' (act_odot UAct (v, w'), w)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor str
  (v,
  tensor (swapping_of_monoidal_cat Mon_W) (w',, w))
· # F
    (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
       (χ (swapping_of_monoidal_cat Mon_W) UAct)
       ((v, w'), w)) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
  (χ' (swapping_of_monoidal_cat Mon_W) UAct)
  ((F v, w'), w)
· # (act_odot UAct)
    (pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor str (v, w')
    #, id w)
· pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor str
    (act_odot UAct (v, w'), w)

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             (pre_whisker_on_nat_z_iso
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data
                      (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                      (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W)))
                (lax_monoidal_functor_μ (pr1 U))
                (pr22 U) (w', w))) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
         (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        (pre_whisker_on_nat_z_iso
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                 (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W)))
           (lax_monoidal_functor_μ (pr1 U)) (pr22 U)
           (w', w))) #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, pr1 str (w', v))
· pr1 str
    (w, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v))

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             ((pr22 U)
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data
                      (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                      (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W))
                   (w', w)))) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
         (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        ((pr22 U)
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                 (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W)) (w', w))))
  #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, pr1 str (w', v))
· pr1 str
    (w, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v))

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
         (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, pr1 str (w', v))
· pr1 str
    (w, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v))

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
str: rel_strength F
v: Mon_V
w', w: Mon_W'
Hyp: str (timesW (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w')
       #, id v)) · # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w')
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, str (w', v))
· str (w, timesV (U w', v))
pr1 str (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
         (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, pr1 str (w', v))
· pr1 str
    (w, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v))

· (# F

Defined.

End RelativeStrength_Is_An_ActionBasedStrength.

Section ActionBasedStrength_Instantiates_To_RelativeStrength.

  Context (F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V) (ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F).

  Local Definition θ' : rel_strength_nat F := pre_whisker binswap_pair_functor ab_str.

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_pentagon_eq F θ'
× rel_strength_rectangle_eq F θ'

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_pentagon_eq F θ'
× rel_strength_rectangle_eq F θ'

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_pentagon_eq F θ'
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_rectangle_eq F θ'

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_pentagon_eq F θ'
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
∏ v : Mon_V,
θ' (monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W, v)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id v))
· # F (lambda v) =
# timesV (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_inv U #, id F v)
· lambda (F v)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
∏ v : Mon_V,
pr1 ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
       #, id v)) · # F (lambda v) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) #, id 
  F v) · lambda (F v)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
v: Mon_V
pr1 ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
       #, id v)) · # F (lambda v) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) #, id 
  F v) · lambda (F v)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
v: Mon_V
Hyp: ab_str (v, I Mon_W') · # F (ϱ Mon_W' UAct v) =
ϱ' Mon_W' UAct (F v)
pr1 ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
       #, id v)) · # F (lambda v) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) #, id 
  F v) · lambda (F v)

F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
v: Mon_V

· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V v) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr12 U) #, id F v)
· monoidal_cat_left_unitor Mon_V (F v)
pr1 ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_unit Mon_W)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U)
       #, id v)) · # F (lambda v) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_ϵ_is_z_iso U) #, id 
  F v) · lambda (F v)

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V

U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
