      apply functor_comp.
    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_rectangle_eq F θ'
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
∏ (w w' : Mon_W) (v : Mon_V),
θ' (timesW (w, w'), v)
· # F
    (# timesV
       (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w')
       #, id v)) · # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_inv U (w, w') #, id F v)
· alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, θ' (w', v))
· θ' (w, timesV (U w', v))
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
∏ (w w' : Mon_W) (v : Mon_V),
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)
 
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
w, w': Mon_W
v: Mon_V
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
w, w': Mon_W
v: Mon_V
Hyp: ab_str (v, tensor Mon_W' (w',, w))
· # F
    (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv 
       (χ Mon_W' UAct) ((v, w'), w)) =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (χ' Mon_W' UAct)
  ((F v, w'), w)
· # (act_odot UAct) (ab_str (v, w') #, id w)
· ab_str (act_odot UAct (v, w'), w)
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
w, w': Mon_W
v: Mon_V
Hyp: ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'))
· # F
    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso'
             ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             (pre_whisker_on_nat_z_iso
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data
                      (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                      (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W)))
                (lax_monoidal_functor_μ (pr1 U))
                (pr22 U) 
                (w', w))) #, id v)
     · monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
         (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        (pre_whisker_on_nat_z_iso
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (Mon_W ⊠ Mon_W))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                 (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W)))
           (lax_monoidal_functor_μ (pr1 U))
           (pr22 U) (w', w))) #, id 
  F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, ab_str (v, w'))
· ab_str
    (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v),
    w)
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)

      
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat

F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V

w, w': Mon_W

Hyp: ab_str (v, monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_W (w, w'))

    (# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)

          (make_z_iso'
             ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             ((pr22 U)
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data

# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)

                 (pr2_functor Mon_W Mon_W)
                 (pr1_functor Mon_W Mon_W))
              (w', w)))) #, id 
  F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (# (pr11 U) (id w) #, ab_str (v, w'))
· ab_str
    (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v),
    w)
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)

       (inv_from_z_iso
          (make_z_iso'
             ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
             ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id v))
· # F
    (monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
       (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), v)) =
# (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso' ((pr112 (pr21 U)) (w, w'))
        ((pr22 U) (w, w'))) #, id 
  F v)
· monoidal_cat_associator Mon_V
    (((pr11 U) w, (pr11 U) w'), F v)
· # (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V)
    (id (pr11 U) w #, ab_str (v, w'))
· ab_str
    (monoidal_cat_tensor Mon_V ((pr11 U) w', v),
    w)
pr1 ab_str (v, timesW (w, w'))
· # F
    (# timesV
       (pr1
          (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U
             (w, w')) #, id v))
· # F (alpha ((U w, U w'), v)) =
# timesV
  (pr1
     (strong_monoidal_functor_μ_is_nat_z_iso U (w, w'))
  #, id F v) · alpha ((U w, U w'), F v)
· # timesV (id U w #, pr1 ab_str (v, w'))
· pr1 ab_str (timesV (U w', v), w)

      exact Hyp.
  Qed.

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength F

  
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength F

    
Mon_W, Mon_V: monoidal_cat
U: strong_monoidal_functor Mon_W Mon_V
F: Mon_V ⟶ Mon_V
ab_str: actionbased_strength Mon_W' UAct UAct F
rel_strength_pentagon_eq F θ'
× rel_strength_rectangle_eq F θ'

    exact relative_strength_from_actionbased_strength_laws.
  Defined.

End ActionBasedStrength_Instantiates_To_RelativeStrength.

End B.

Arguments ab_strength_triangle {_ _ _ _ _} _.
Arguments ab_strength_pentagon {_ _ _ _ _} _.
Arguments ab_strong_functor_strength {_ _ _ _} _.
